scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./src/styles.css -o ./dist/styles.css --minify && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp src/main.js dist/main.js && cp src/hadlock.js dist/hadlock.js && cp src/mazeConnectivity.js dist/mazeConnectivity.js && cp src/mazeStats.js dist/mazeStats.js && cp ../src/maze_solver/algorithm_catalog.json dist/algorithm_catalog.json && cp ../src/maze_solver/known_2d_backlog.json dist/known_2d_backlog.json && cp favicon.svg dist/favicon.svg
